title: createCustodianRequest
description: Schema for createCustodianRequest in Nuix ECC REST API

custodianName.description: name of the custodian to be created

description.description: optional, description of the custodian to be created

groups.description: optional, array of ids(s) of group(s) this custodian will be added to

groupId.description: id of the group to add this custodian to
